title: findings.json intermediate schema (legal-contract-review)
description: Cross-cutting machine-readable intermediate that the contract-review pipeline emits alongside the 6 .md outputs. It is the canonical structured snapshot of pipeline state, consumed by scripts/self_grade.py for deterministic-tier rubric checks (ANS-01 ~ ANS-17, SRC-01 ~ SRC-05). This is NOT a user-facing file — it's the LLM ↔ Python contract. v0.3.1+ adds stance_asymmetry_check, cycle_check.vague_sub_mechanism, and top_3_business_impacts shape.

findings.description: L7 evaluate findings (issues / matched playbook entries / advisory) — mirrors issues.md findings

matched_variant_outcome.description: required when variant_id is set (ABAC pre-filter result)

stance_asymmetry_downgrade.description: v0.3.1+: L7 Step 1.5 downgraded this from risk to strategic-note because stance=ours and absence PROTECTS us

stance_asymmetry_check.description: v0.3.1+: trace of L7 Step 1.5 evaluation

proposed_text_send_now.description: v0.3.1+: the text to actually send to counterparty. Empty when stance_asymmetry_downgrade=true.

proposed_text_internal_fallback.description: v0.3.1+: internal-only fallback position; surfaces only if 對方 raises X at renewal.

proposed_text.description: DEPRECATED v0.3.1+ — kept for backwards-compatibility; new code should use proposed_text_send_now + proposed_text_internal_fallback

supports.description: which CRAC step (rule / analysis / conclusion) this citation backs

url.description: if set, must match SRC-03 URL allowlist (law.moj.gov.tw / judgment.judicial.gov.tw / *.gov.tw / mops.twse.com.tw)

applicability_caveat.description: v0.3.1+: per L7 Step 9.3, borderline-applicable citations record their scope limitation here (e.g. '本條主要規範定型化契約；本合約為 1-on-1 negotiated B2B')

top_3_business_impacts.description: v0.3.1+: per L7 Step 9.4 headline rule — entries MUST have severity∈{yellow,red} + concrete quantifiable downside + actionable in 30/60/90 days. NEVER ordered by playbook structure.

quantifiable_downside_evidence.description: the dollar / month / customer / regulatory figure justifying Top-3 inclusion

favorable_position_notes.description: v0.3.1+: findings that L7 Step 1.5 downgraded to green/strategic-note (stance-favorable absences). Renders under '✓ 對我方有利' in issues.md + memo-business.md.

override_triggered.description: v0.3.1+: banner placement scope = memo-legal.md + escalation.md only (NOT issues / redline / memo-business)

placeholder_warnings.description: informative warnings the user sees when escalate_to is still '[請編輯…]'; enforced by ANS-07

termination_condition.description: ANS-12 enforces this starts with 'gaps_zero_at_cycle_' (max_cycles_hit = fail)

vague_sub_mechanisms_by_dimension.description: v0.3.1+: per-dimension counts (marking_requirement / sub_processor_consent / breach_notification_window / etc.)
